div.h3: Snapshot at moment of invariant violation detection

div.p: Legend 🔴 Red = Violating node (LEADER in same term) 🟢 Green = Normal node (FOLLOWER) 🟡 Yellow = Vote relationships 🔵 Blue = Log data

NodeState { NodeId string ~16 bytes Term int 8 bytes State string ~8 bytes CommitIndex int 8 bytes LastApplied int 8 bytes LogLen int 8 bytes LogEntries []Entry var VotedFor string ~16 bytes } ~72 bytes + log entries
[1] term=1 cmd="init" [2] term=1 cmd="set x=1" [3] term=1 cmd="set y=2" ... [99] term=4 cmd="delete z" [100] term=4 cmd="set w=5" [101] term=5 cmd="noop" ← own term
[1] term=1 cmd="init" [2] term=1 cmd="set x=1" [3] term=1 cmd="set y=2" ... [94] term=4 cmd="get a" [95] term=4 cmd="set b=3" [96] term=5 cmd="noop" ← own term
